zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Kynnardsleye Jr於1282年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親John de Kynnardsleye22歲，母親Joan de22歲。他於1327年與Joanne de Ferrers在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1350年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾武托希特享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Kynnardsleye Jr于1282年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲John de Kynnardsleye22岁，母亲Joan de22岁。他于1327年与Joanne de Ferrers在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1350年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Kynnardsleye Jr was born in 1282, in Herefordshire, England, his father, John de Kynnardsleye, was 22 and his mother, Joan de, was 22. He married Joanne de Ferrers in 1327, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1350, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Kynnardsleye Jr est né en 1282, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Kynnardsleye, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan de, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joanne de Ferrers en 1327, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1350, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Kynnardsleye Jr 1282 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Kynnardsleye 22 und seine Mutter Joan de 22. Er hat 1327 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joanne de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Kynnardsleye Jr è nato il nel 1282 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, John de Kynnardsleye, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan de, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joanne de Ferrers nel 1327, nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1350, nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Kynnardsleye Jrが1282年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Kynnardsleyeは22歳，母Joan deは22歳であった。1327年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターでJoanne de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1350年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Kynnardsleye Jr(이)가 1282년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Kynnardsleye(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 Joanne de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Kynnardsleye Jr nasceu em 1282, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Kynnardsleye, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan de, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanne de Ferrers em 1327, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1350, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Kynnardsleye Jr родился в 1282 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Kynnardsleye было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanne de Ferrers в 1327 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1350 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Kynnardsleye Jr nació en 1282, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Kynnardsleye, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan de, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joanne de Ferrers en 1327, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1350, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
